basic_details.short_information: Central Electronics Limited (CEL) has released the official Consultant Notification 2026 at Central Electronics Limited. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CEL Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 63 years with a Graduate qualification, preferably in Law/ Personnel Management/ Industrial Relations, can apply offline on or before 03-06-2026. The official notification PDF and application form details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, preferably with a degree in Law/ Personnel Management/Industrial Relations
qualification.details: Graduate, preferably with a degree in Law/ Personnel Management/Industrial Relations. More than 20 years of experience in dealing with disciplinary cases, investigation of complaints, framing of charge sheet, interpretation of CVC/DOPT/CDA rules, presentation of departmental inquiry cases before the inquiry authority etc. Preference for training courses in administrative vigilance organized by Institute of Secretariat Training & Management, Department of Personnel & Training, Govt. of India/ Central Bureau of Investigation.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
